name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding at their Detroit location and online.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical location at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, and provides online lending services for consumers needing rapid access to cash. The company specializes in short-term lending products designed for borrowers with varying credit profiles, including those with poor or no credit history. Their service model combines in-person consultations (with extended hours Mon-Fri 8am-9pm, Sat-Sun 10am-7pm) with online application options to accommodate different customer preferences.

The company offers multiple loan products including payday loans ($1,000 or less), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and quick loans. All products are marketed as unsecured and accept applicants regardless of credit type. Their stated process involves online application submission, connection with third-party lenders, offer review, contract signing, and cash deposit. The company emphasizes fast approval timelines and positions itself as a lender of last resort for consumers facing urgent financial needs.

US Cash Advance distinguishes itself through personal service quality, with customer reviews highlighting staff member Doris for patience and transparency regarding loan terms and fees. The company claims to avoid hidden fees and shady lending practices, differentiating from predatory lenders. They process applications quickly (one review mentions 45 minutes in-person, another mentions receiving funds within hours). The company also explicitly welcomes bad credit applicants, positioning accessibility as a core value proposition.

However, this company operates in the high-cost lending space where APRs and terms are not disclosed on their website. While customers praise transparency about specific loans, the absence of published rate information, fee structures, and repayment terms is a significant limitation for consumer research and comparison. The reliance on third-party lenders and the vague underwriting process create questions about actual terms offered. Customer reviews, while positive, are limited in sample size and depth regarding the true cost of borrowing.
pros: Extended business hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) for working customers
Fast approval process with same-day funding reported in customer reviews (within 2 hours to 45 minutes documented)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit explicitly, reducing barriers to borrowing
Loan amounts up to $50,000 for bad credit loans, larger than typical payday loan limits
Staff transparency regarding repayment terms and fees reported by customers
No collateral required for loans (unsecured products)
Minimum paperwork requirement and simple online application process
cons: APR, interest rates, and fee structures not disclosed anywhere on the website, preventing rate comparison
Physical location limited to Detroit, Michigan; online lending uses third-party lenders without clarity on terms consistency
Heavy reliance on third-party lenders creates uncertainty about which lender actually funds loans and what terms apply
Customer reviews mention cramped waiting area and suggest need for online pre-approval improvements
One customer review appears to reference a different company (Express Payday Loans), raising questions about review authenticity
best_for: Workers with bad credit history needing $100-$1,000 for immediate expenses before payday
Consumers facing medical bills, car repairs, or other unexpected urgent costs requiring same-day cash
Borrowers who prefer in-person consultations and have access to the Detroit location
Applicants needing loans larger than typical payday loans ($5,000-$50,000) but unable to access traditional personal loans
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area consumers or online applicants with poor credit who need $100-$50,000 in emergency cash within hours and can accept higher-cost lending. The critical caveat is that APR and fee information are entirely absent from their website, making it impossible to assess true borrowing costs before application—consumers should obtain written rate quotes and compare terms carefully before accepting any loan.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit location
